heading.zh: 性质词描述——用 more/most 比较

body.en: Adjectives describe things (good, long, red). Compare with more and most: more beautiful, the most beautiful. Many opposites come in pairs (good/bad, old/young) or with a prefix.
body.zh: 形容词描述事物（good, long, red）。用 more 和 most 比较：more beautiful, the most beautiful。许多反义词成对出现（good/bad, old/young）或加前缀。

gloss.en: having the skill or chance to do something

words.example: She is able to swim very well.

gloss.en: having a sour, sharp taste like a lemon

words.example: The fruit has an acid taste.

gloss.en: feeling strong dislike or upset
working by itself without a person
very nice to look at
the darkest colour, like night
very hot, like water that bubbles

words.example: Be careful, the water is boiling.

gloss.en: full of light; shining strongly

words.example: The sun is very bright today.

gloss.en: damaged; not whole or working
the colour of earth or coffee
costing little money
connected with chemistry or chemicals

words.example: The plant makes a chemical change.

gloss.en: most important; main
not dirty

words.example: Wash your hands until they are clean.

gloss.en: easy to understand or see
happening often; found in many places
having many parts; hard to understand
awake and aware of things

words.example: She is conscious of the danger.

gloss.en: made shorter or opened with a knife
going far down from the top

words.example: The river is very deep here.

gloss.en: needing someone or something to live

words.example: A baby is dependent on its mother.

gloss.en: near the start of a time or event

words.example: I woke up in the early morning.

gloss.en: able to stretch and go back
using or making electricity
the same in size, number or value

words.example: Cut the cake into equal parts.

gloss.en: having too much flesh; heavy
good for growing plants

words.example: The soil here is very fertile.

gloss.en: coming before all others

words.example: This is my first day at school.

gloss.en: staying the same; not changing
smooth and level; not curved

words.example: The house has a flat roof.

gloss.en: not busy; having no plans
happening often

words.example: He is a frequent visitor here.

gloss.en: holding as much as possible

words.example: The glass is full of water.

gloss.en: affecting all or most people or things

words.example: The book is for general interest.

gloss.en: of high quality; nice
very good or very big
the colour of smoke or ashes
fixed at the top so the lower part is free

words.example: There is a hanging lamp over the table.

gloss.en: feeling or showing pleasure
difficult; not easy
having good health; not ill
going up a long way from the bottom

words.example: That is a very high mountain.

gloss.en: having an empty space inside
having a great effect; of great value
caring and friendly to others
similar to; the same as

words.example: The two boys are very like each other.

gloss.en: alive now

words.example: We care for all living things.

gloss.en: measuring a great length or distance
being a man or boy
having a husband or wife
about money and things, not the mind
connected with illness and its treatment
connected with soldiers or the army
made by nature, not by people
needed for a purpose or reason

words.example: It may be necessary to buy a new one.

gloss.en: made or started a short time ago

words.example: Have you read her new book?

gloss.en: usual or ordinary; what you expect
not closed; letting things through

words.example: A bird flew in the open window.

gloss.en: lines that stay the same distance apart
gone by in time; before now

words.example: It rained a lot in past years.

gloss.en: connected with the body, not the mind
connected with government or the state

words.example: The king had no political power.

gloss.en: having very little money

words.example: They were too poor to buy shoes.

gloss.en: able to be done or to happen

words.example: It is possible to learn fast.

gloss.en: existing or happening now

words.example: I am happy with the present plan.

gloss.en: for one person or group, not the public
likely to happen or be true
done with speed; taking little time
making very little noise
prepared and able to start now

words.example: Wait a minute, I am almost ready.

gloss.en: the colour of blood or fire
happening with the same time in between
having the duty to take care of something

words.example: Mike is responsible for the project.

gloss.en: true or correct

words.example: Did you get the answer right?

gloss.en: shaped like a circle or a ball

words.example: We sat at a round table.
